title: galium erectum var. lovcense
intro: Galium erectum var. lovcense, also known as Lovćen bedstraw or Lovćen sweet bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium erectum plant, which is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Balkan Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Galium erectum var. lovcense include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Galium erectum var. lovcense can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, often used to treat various health conditions, although its uses and preparations should be further researched and verified for their effectiveness and safety.
